summary.lv: GR8 Tech (iGaming platforma) meklē Middle Customer Support speciālistu, kas risinās incidentus, sadarbosies ar DevOps, QA un produkta komandām un nodrošinās SLA atbilstību tehniskā atbalsta procesos.
summary.en: GR8 Tech, an iGaming platform, is hiring a Middle Customer Support Specialist to triage incidents, collaborate with DevOps, QA and product teams, and own SLA compliance for technical support.
